title: Byrsella elephanticeps
taxonomy: Byrsella elephanticeps is classified within the genus Byrsella, which belongs to the family of jumping bristletails, Meinertellidae. This classification is part of the order Archaeognatha, which includes ancient insects with a primitive body structure. The order Archaeognatha is further divided into several families, with Meinertellidae being one of the most distinctive. Byrsella elephanticeps is a species within this genus, characterized by its unique morphological features. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships within the Byrsella genus.
